title: gymnogramma flexuosa
intro: Gymnogramma flexuosa, also known as the flexible Gymnogramma, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Gymnogramma flexuosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
